
```{r, include = FALSE}
# Load ASA Library
library(itscalledsoccer)
library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
library(mgcv)
library(lme4)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)

# Instantiate a new instance of the ASA class
asa_client <- AmericanSoccerAnalysis$new()

all_games <- asa_client$games
all_teams <- asa_client$teams
all_players <- asa_client$players

asa_client$LEAGUES

# Load Roster Construction Data
mls_roster_construction <- read.csv('Updated_MLS_Roster_Construction_2025.csv')
```

```{r}
players <- asa_client$get_players(leagues = 'mls')
teams <- asa_client$get_teams(leagues = 'mls')

# Get team g+ information (i.e., goals added) from MLS
# tall version
asa_goals_added_tall <- asa_client$get_team_goals_added(
    leagues = "mls", season_name = 2025) |>
    tidyr::unnest(data) |>
  left_join(teams, by = c("team_id" = "team_id"))
  
asa_mls_salaries <- asa_client$get_player_salaries(leagues = 'mls') |>
  left_join(players, by = c("player_id"="player_id"))

mls_salaries_2025 <- asa_mls_salaries |>
  filter(season_name == 2025)

mls_salaries_by_team <- mls_salaries_2025 |>
  group_by(team_id) |>
  summarize(total_salary = sum(base_salary))

reference_date <- as.Date("2025-07-01")

mls_salaries_2025 <- mls_salaries_2025 |>
  mutate(
    birth_date = as.Date(birth_date),
    age = as.numeric(difftime(reference_date, birth_date, units = "days")) / 365.25
  )

```

Describe any major cleaning steps here

```{r}
# -------------------------
# TEAM-LEVEL OUTCOME DATA
# -------------------------

# Team performance outcome: expected goal differential
asa_team_xgoals_tall <- asa_client$get_team_xgoals(
    leagues = "mls",
    season_name = 2025
  ) |>
  left_join(teams, by = "team_id")

team_performance <- asa_team_xgoals_tall |>
  group_by(team_id, team_name) |>
  summarize(
    xg_for = sum(xgoals_for, na.rm = TRUE),
    xg_against = sum(xgoals_against, na.rm = TRUE),
    xgd = xg_for - xg_against,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# -------------------------
# TEAM-LEVEL SALARY FEATURES
# -------------------------

team_salary <- mls_salaries_2025 |>
  group_by(team_id) |>
  summarize(
    total_salary = sum(base_salary, na.rm = TRUE),
    roster_size = n(),
    avg_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

salary_concentration <- mls_salaries_2025 |>
  group_by(team_id) |>
  arrange(desc(base_salary), .by_group = TRUE) |>
  mutate(rank = row_number()) |>
  summarize(
    top3_salary = sum(base_salary[rank <= 3], na.rm = TRUE),
    team_salary_tmp = sum(base_salary, na.rm = TRUE),
    top3_share = top3_salary / team_salary_tmp,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  select(team_id, top3_share)

efficiency_features <- mls_salaries_2025 |>
  group_by(team_id) |>
  summarize(
    salary_variance = var(base_salary, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_salary = median(base_salary, na.rm = TRUE),
    low_salary_share = mean(base_salary < 200000, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# -------------------------
# POSITIONAL FEATURES
# -------------------------

position_salary <- mls_salaries_2025 |>
  group_by(team_id, position) |>
  summarize(
    pos_salary = sum(base_salary, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  group_by(team_id) |>
  mutate(
    team_salary = sum(pos_salary, na.rm = TRUE),
    pos_share = pos_salary / team_salary
  ) |>
  ungroup()

position_wide <- position_salary |>
  select(team_id, position, pos_share) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = position,
    values_from = pos_share,
    values_fill = 0
  )
```

```{r}
# -------------------------
# CLEAN ROSTER CONSTRUCTION FILE
# -------------------------

mls_roster_construction <- mls_roster_construction |>
  rename(
    team_csv = team,
    roster_model = model
  ) |>
  mutate(
    roster_model = factor(roster_model),
    strategy = case_when(
      roster_model == "3DP+3U22" ~ "DP_model",
      roster_model == "2DP+4U22" ~ "Youth_model",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
team_name_crosswalk <- tibble(
  team_csv = c(
    "Atlanta United FC",
    "Austin FC",
    "Charlotte FC",
    "Chicago Fire FC",
    "FC Cincinnati",
    "Colorado Rapids",
    "Columbus Crew",
    "FC Dallas",
    "D.C. United",
    "Houston Dynamo FC",
    "Sporting Kansas City",
    "LA Galaxy",
    "Los Angeles FC",
    "Inter Miami CF",
    "Minnesota United FC",
    "CF Montréal",
    "Nashville SC",
    "New England Revolution",
    "New York City FC",
    "New York Red Bulls",
    "Orlando City SC",
    "Philadelphia Union",
    "Portland Timbers FC",
    "Real Salt Lake",
    "San Diego FC",
    "San Jose Earthquakes",
    "Seattle Sounders FC",
    "St. Louis City SC",
    "Toronto FC",
    "Vancouver Whitecaps FC"
  ),
  team_name = c(
    "Atlanta United FC",
    "Austin FC",
    "Charlotte FC",
    "Chicago Fire FC",
    "FC Cincinnati",
    "Colorado Rapids",
    "Columbus Crew",
    "FC Dallas",
    "D.C. United",
    "Houston Dynamo FC",
    "Sporting Kansas City",
    "LA Galaxy",
    "Los Angeles FC",
    "Inter Miami CF",
    "Minnesota United FC",
    "CF Montréal",
    "Nashville SC",
    "New England Revolution",
    "New York City FC",
    "New York Red Bulls",
    "Orlando City SC",
    "Philadelphia Union",
    "Portland Timbers FC",
    "Real Salt Lake",
    "San Diego FC",
    "San Jose Earthquakes",
    "Seattle Sounders FC",
    "St. Louis City SC",
    "Toronto FC",
    "Vancouver Whitecaps FC"
  )
)
```

```{r}
roster_rules_clean <- mls_roster_construction |>
  left_join(team_name_crosswalk, by = "team_csv") |>
  left_join(team_performance |> select(team_id, team_name), by = "team_name") |>
  select(team_id, roster_model, strategy, dp_count, u22_count)

team_model_data <- team_performance |>
  left_join(team_salary, by = "team_id") |>
  left_join(salary_concentration, by = "team_id") |>
  left_join(efficiency_features, by = "team_id") |>
  left_join(position_wide, by = "team_id") |>
  left_join(roster_rules_clean, by = "team_id") |>
  mutate(
    log_salary = log(total_salary),
    dp_per_roster = dp_count / roster_size,
    u22_per_roster = u22_count / roster_size
  )

# identify top dp_count players per team
dp_salary_feature <- mls_salaries_2025 |>
  group_by(team_id) |>
  arrange(desc(base_salary), .by_group = TRUE) |>
  mutate(rank = row_number()) |>
  left_join(roster_rules_clean, by = "team_id") |>
  summarize(
    dp_salary_share = sum(base_salary[rank <= dp_count], na.rm = TRUE) / sum(base_salary),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

team_model_data <- team_model_data |>
  left_join(dp_salary_feature, by = "team_id")

team_model_data |>
  select(team_id, team_name, roster_model, dp_count, u22_count) |>
  print(n = Inf)
```

```{r}
# -------------------------
# MULTI-SEASON TEAM PANEL
# -------------------------

seasons <- 2013:2025

# Team xG by season
asa_team_xgoals_panel <- asa_client$get_team_xgoals(
  leagues = "mls",
  season_name = seasons,
  split_by_seasons = TRUE
) |>
  left_join(teams, by = "team_id")

team_performance_panel <- asa_team_xgoals_panel |>
  group_by(team_id, team_name, season_name) |>
  summarize(
    xg_for = sum(xgoals_for, na.rm = TRUE),
    xg_against = sum(xgoals_against, na.rm = TRUE),
    xgd = xg_for - xg_against,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Salary data across all seasons
mls_salaries_panel <- asa_client$get_player_salaries(
  leagues = "mls",
  season_name = seasons
) |>
  left_join(players, by = "player_id")

team_salary_panel <- mls_salaries_panel |>
  group_by(team_id, season_name) |>
  summarize(
    total_salary = sum(base_salary, na.rm = TRUE),
    roster_size = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

salary_concentration_panel <- mls_salaries_panel |>
  group_by(team_id, season_name) |>
  arrange(desc(base_salary), .by_group = TRUE) |>
  mutate(rank = row_number()) |>
  summarize(
    top3_salary = sum(base_salary[rank <= 3], na.rm = TRUE),
    team_salary_tmp = sum(base_salary, na.rm = TRUE),
    top3_share = top3_salary / team_salary_tmp,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  select(team_id, season_name, top3_share)

team_performance_panel <- team_performance_panel |>
  mutate(season_name = as.integer(season_name))

team_salary_panel <- team_salary_panel |>
  mutate(season_name = as.integer(season_name))

salary_concentration_panel <- salary_concentration_panel |>
  mutate(season_name = as.integer(season_name))

panel_team_data <- team_performance_panel |>
  left_join(team_salary_panel, by = c("team_id", "season_name")) |>
  left_join(salary_concentration_panel, by = c("team_id", "season_name")) |>
  mutate(
    log_salary = log(total_salary),
    season_name = factor(season_name)
  )

panel_team_model <- lm(
  xgd ~ log_salary + top3_share + season_name,
  data = panel_team_data
)

summary(panel_team_model)
broom::tidy(panel_team_model, conf.int = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# -------------------------
# PLAYER-SEASON DATA
# -------------------------

asa_player_gplus <- asa_client$get_player_goals_added(
  leagues = "mls",
  season_name = seasons,
  split_by_seasons = TRUE,
  split_by_teams = TRUE,
  above_replacement = TRUE
)

player_salaries_panel <- asa_client$get_player_salaries(
  leagues = "mls",
  season_name = seasons
) |>
  left_join(players, by = "player_id")

asa_player_gplus <- asa_player_gplus |>
  mutate(
    season_name = as.integer(season_name),
    team_id = as.character(team_id)
  )

player_salaries_panel <- player_salaries_panel |>
  mutate(
    season_name = as.integer(season_name),
    team_id = as.character(team_id)
  )

player_salaries_panel <- player_salaries_panel |>
  group_by(player_id, team_id, season_name) |>
  summarize(
    base_salary = mean(base_salary, na.rm = TRUE),
    position = first(position),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

player_season <- asa_player_gplus |>
  left_join(
    player_salaries_panel,
    by = c("player_id", "team_id", "season_name")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    log_salary = log(base_salary + 1),
    position = factor(position)
  )
```

```{r}

fit_player_gam <- gam(
  goals_added_above_replacement ~ 
    s(log_salary, k = 5) +
    position +
    s(log_salary, by = position, k = 4),
  data = player_season,
  method = "REML"
)

summary(fit_player_gam)
```

```{r}
player_season <- player_season |>
  mutate(
    predicted_value = predict(fit_player_gam, newdata = player_season),
    team_id = as.character(team_id),
    season_name = as.integer(season_name)
  )

player_season <- player_season |>
  left_join(players |> select(player_id, birth_date), by = "player_id") |>
  mutate(
    age = season_name - lubridate::year(birth_date)
  )

team_efficiency <- player_season |>
  group_by(team_id, season_name) |>
  summarize(
    predicted_team_value = sum(predicted_value * minutes_played / 90, na.rm = TRUE),
    player_total_salary = sum(base_salary, na.rm = TRUE),
    roster_sz = n_distinct(player_id),
    pct_att = mean(position == "F"),
    pct_midfielders = mean(position == "M"),
    avg_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

panel_team_data <- panel_team_data |>
  mutate(
    team_id = as.character(team_id),
    season_name = as.integer(as.character(season_name))
  )

team_efficiency_model_data <- panel_team_data |>
  left_join(team_efficiency, by = c("team_id", "season_name")) |>
  filter(!is.na(xgd), !is.na(predicted_team_value), !is.na(player_total_salary))
```

```{r}
team_efficiency_model <- lm(
  xgd ~ predicted_team_value + player_total_salary +  factor(season_name) +
    avg_age + pct_att + pct_midfielders,
  data = team_efficiency_model_data
)


summary(team_efficiency_model)
broom::tidy(team_efficiency_model, conf.int = TRUE)
```

```{r}
team_efficiency_model_data <- team_efficiency_model_data |>
  mutate(
    pred_val_s = scale(predicted_team_value),
    salary_s = scale(player_total_salary),
    age_s = scale(avg_age),
    pct_att_s = scale(pct_att),
    pct_mid_s = scale(pct_midfielders)
  )

team_efficiency_model_ml <- lmer(
  xgd ~ pred_val_s + salary_s + age_s + pct_att_s + pct_mid_s +
    (1 | team_id) + (1 | season_name),
  data = team_efficiency_model_data
)

summary(team_efficiency_model_ml)

library(lmerTest)

model_no_team <- lmer(
  xgd ~ pred_val_s + salary_s + age_s + pct_att_s + pct_mid_s +
    (1 | season_name),
  data = team_efficiency_model_data
)

anova(model_no_team, team_efficiency_model_ml)
```
